headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -106.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 62% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 148 quotes and an overwhelming 120 at strong intensity - people are really angry today.
• The frustration score of 92.2 sits in the upper half of the historical range, showing sustained high irritation levels.
• Optimism crashed from yesterday's near-neutral position to deeply negative territory despite having 35 strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
